title: Jams and Marmalades
description: A mod I made a while back that adds some nice foodstuffs. created for 1.16, now updated to 1.20.4.
body:
A mod I made a while back 1.16 but never updated it. Might update it for 1.20 or 1.21. Originaly uploaded to curseforge. (1.20.4 version now available!)

- Strawberry
- Strawberry without top
- Strawberry top
- Strawberry plant
- Strawberry bucket
- Strawberry jam
- Strawberry jam in jar
- Strawberry creative tab
- Knife
- Soft bread
- Soft wheat
- Soft bread with strawberry jam
- Recipes for all items
- and much more

link to the original [curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/jams-and-marmelades) page.

Images and links coming soon!
